evals.prompt:
分析这段 Kafka Producer 日志：

[2026-01-15 10:23:45] INFO  [kafka-producer-network-thread | producer-1] Successfully sent record to topic orders partition 5 offset 12345
[2026-01-15 10:23:46] ERROR [kafka-producer-network-thread | producer-1] Failed to send record to topic payments: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:23:47] WARN  [kafka-producer-network-thread | producer-1] BufferExhaustedException: Buffer is full, blocking for 1000ms
expectations: 识别出 send_success 事件
识别出 send_failure 事件和 TimeoutException 错误
识别出 buffer_exhausted 事件
对 send_failure 建议 P1 优先级修复
提供 TimeoutException 的配置调整建议

evals.prompt:
分析这段 Kafka Consumer 日志，重点关注消费积压问题：

[2026-01-15 10:23:48] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Consumer group order-processor: assigned partitions [orders-0, orders-1]
[2026-01-15 10:23:49] WARN  [kafka-consumer-thread] Consumer group order-processor: lag exceeded threshold (50000 messages)
[2026-01-15 10:23:50] ERROR [kafka-consumer-thread] CommitFailedException: Commit cannot be completed due to group rebalance
evals.expected_output: 应检测到消费积压和提交失败
expectations: 识别出 consumer_lag 事件，积压 50000 条
识别出 commit_failure 事件
消费积压判定为 P1 优先级
提供增加 Consumer 实例的建议
提供调整 max.poll.interval.ms 的建议

evals.prompt:
分析这段 JSON 格式的 Kafka 日志：

{"timestamp": "2026-01-15T10:23:45Z", "level": "ERROR", "thread": "kafka-producer-1", "message": "Failed to send record to topic orders", "error": "NetworkException", "topic": "orders", "traceId": "abc-123"}
evals.expected_output: 应正确解析 JSON 格式并提取字段
expectations: 正确解析 JSON 格式
提取 timestamp、level、thread 字段
识别 send_failure 事件和 NetworkException 错误
提取 topic 和 traceId 字段
自动检测为 JSON 格式

evals.prompt:
这段日志显示频繁 Rebalance，请分析原因并提供建议：

[2026-01-15 10:23:51] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Revoking previously assigned partitions [orders-0]
[2026-01-15 10:23:52] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] (Re-)joining group order-processor
[2026-01-15 10:23:53] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Successfully joined group order-processor with generation 5
[2026-01-15 10:23:54] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] Revoking previously assigned partitions [orders-0]
[2026-01-15 10:23:55] INFO  [kafka-consumer-thread] (Re-)joining group order-processor
evals.expected_output: 应检测到频繁 Rebalance 问题（rebalance_storm）
expectations: 识别出多次 rebalance 事件
检测到 rebalance_storm 异常
指出 Rebalance 频繁的问题严重性为 high 或 critical
提供 session.timeout.ms 和 max.poll.interval.ms 配置建议
建议使用静态成员 group.instance.id

evals.prompt:
分析这段 Broker 日志：

[2026-01-15 10:23:56] INFO  [ReplicaManager] Partition orders-5: leader changed from 1 to 2
[2026-01-15 10:23:57] WARN  [ReplicaFetcherThread] Replica not available for partition orders-5
[2026-01-15 10:23:58] ERROR [KafkaApi] NotLeaderForPartitionException: Leader not local for partition orders-5
evals.expected_output: 应识别 Broker 层面的问题
expectations: 识别出 leader_change 事件
识别出副本不可用相关日志
识别出 NotLeaderForPartitionException
Leader 切换判定为 P2（偶发可自动恢复）
说明这是正常的 Leader 切换，可以重试

evals.prompt:
分析以下混合日志，按优先级排序所有问题：

[2026-01-15 10:23:45] INFO  [producer-1] Successfully sent record to topic events partition 0 offset 100
[2026-01-15 10:23:46] ERROR [producer-1] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:23:46] ERROR [producer-1] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:23:47] WARN  [consumer-1] Consumer group order-processor: lag exceeded threshold (20000 messages)
[2026-01-15 10:23:48] ERROR [producer-1] ProducerFencedException: producer with transactional.id order-tx-1 fenced
[2026-01-15 10:23:49] INFO  [consumer-1] Assigned partitions [orders-0, orders-1]
evals.expected_output: 应按 P0→P1→P2→P3 正确排序各项问题
expectations: ProducerFencedException 判定为 P0
消费积压 20000 条被判为 P1
TimeoutException 判为 P1（2次 ERROR）
按优先级从高到低排序输出
给出整体修复优先级建议

evals.prompt:
以下日志在 10:23~10:25 时间段内集中出现错误，请做时间线分析：

[2026-01-15 10:23:45] INFO  [producer-1] Successfully sent record to topic events
[2026-01-15 10:23:46] WARN  [consumer-1] lag exceeded threshold (1000 messages)
[2026-01-15 10:24:10] ERROR [producer-1] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:24:11] ERROR [producer-1] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:24:12] ERROR [producer-1] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:24:30] WARN  [consumer-1] lag exceeded threshold (5000 messages)
[2026-01-15 10:25:00] WARN  [consumer-1] lag exceeded threshold (15000 messages)
evals.expected_output: 应识别出错误集中在 10:23~10:25 时间段，且消费积压在加速增长
expectations: 识别错误集中在 10:23~10:25 时间段
指出消费积压从 1000 增长到 15000，呈现加速趋势
检测到 error_rate_spike 或 error_rate_trend_up
建议检查该时段是否有部署变更或流量突增
提供时间线形式的输出

evals.prompt:
这段日志显示 orders topic 的 Producer 超时，请搜索项目中的 Kafka 配置和 OrderProducer 类，给出代码层面的修复方案：

[2026-01-15 10:24:10] ERROR [order-producer] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:24:11] ERROR [order-producer] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
[2026-01-15 10:24:12] ERROR [order-producer] Failed to send record to topic orders: TimeoutException
evals.expected_output: 应触发源码联动阶段，搜索项目中 Kafka 配置和 Producer 代码
expectations: 建议搜索 application.yml 中的 Kafka 配置
建议搜索 OrderProducer 类的代码
给出 request.timeout.ms 调优建议
建议添加异步回调错误处理
提供可执行的代码修复 diff

evals.prompt:
分析这段包含序列化错误的日志：

[2026-01-15 10:23:45] INFO  [producer-1] Successfully sent record to topic events
[2026-01-15 10:23:46] ERROR [producer-1] SerializationException: Error serializing key/value for topic orders
[2026-01-15 10:23:47] ERROR [producer-1] SerializationException: Error serializing key/value for topic orders
[2026-01-15 10:23:48] ERROR [producer-1] SerializationException: Error serializing key/value for topic orders
evals.expected_output: 应检测到 serialization_errors 异常聚类
expectations: 识别出 serialization_error 事件
检测到 serialization_errors 异常（>=3次）
建议检查 Schema Registry 兼容性
确认 Producer/Consumer Serializer 配置一致
判定优先级为 P1 或 P2
